alerts.detail: Prior SCREENER_BLOCKED condition is RESOLVED this run. SCAN_ID env this container = aa5ac5af-f053-400a-be49-5f33147bf3d6 (DIFFERENT from the 0cfa55c7-... seen by 09:30-10:13 runs, which returned AGREEMENT_NOT_SIGNED / NotFound). run_scan on the new scan_id succeeded: 'Top Most Active Movers', 200 rows. Operator evidently re-provisioned the saved scan and/or signed the agreement. Screener built normally; prior blocking alert cleared.

This is the FIRST market-hours run to reach Step 6 with a usable screener, so it ran as the one-time dry run. No entry signal fired (see notes), so no real OR dry-run order was placed. Per spec, live_trading_enabled set TRUE at end of run; every subsequent run trades live with no further gating.

RECURRING infra issue: this run's container again started with a STALE/EMPTY checkout (no state.json present locally) and the default remote URL (https://oauth2:@github.com/...) had no usable push credential. Recovered by fetching authoritative origin/main, hard-resetting onto it, then re-applying this run's updates; pushed using https with GITHUB_TOKEN env. Operator should fix the persistent remote credential + ensure the container clones current main, or cross-run persistence may silently break.
